scope: Registered-menu no-go over convex-combination shape proxies. This output is not a physical density-weighted multi-fluid background calculation and not a covariance-aware DESI likelihood.

desi_target.source: DESI DR2 BAO + CMB + DES-Dovekie recalibrated CPL diagnostic target (arXiv:2511.07517)
desi_target.role: external diagnostic target, not selected for fit
desi_target.diagnostic_score_scope: Diagnostic diagonal-error score only; DESI covariance is not included, so joint_marginal_distance_diagnostic is not a likelihood distance or closure threshold.

lambda_baseline.source: Frozen-phason VEV; Omega_Lambda_0 swept across a defensible cosmological range

biogenic_terrestrial.source: Madau-Dickinson 2014 SFR shape; biogenic DE pipeline CPL amplitude

biogenic_extra.source: Extragalactic biogenic channel, stronger phantom amplitude

channels.scope: compatibility alias for consumers; not a physical multi-fluid density evolution

structural_ceiling.note: w_total(z) is a convex combination of the per-channel w_c(z); it cannot exceed max_c w_c(z) for any channel-fraction choice. The DES-Dovekie recalibrated central w_0 lies above this ceiling, so the registered five-channel partition cannot reproduce it for any Omega_Lambda_0 or any other swept parameter unless an O.13 channel-menu closure path adds a channel above the ceiling.
